title: ‘People still remember it 40 years later’: the making of Chuckie Egg
summary: The iconic game that came to define 8-bit programming still conjures flutters of nostalgia 40 years on – all thanks to a 15-year-old tea boy who worked a Saturday shift in a computer shop in Greater ManchesterIf you were playing games on a home computer in the early 1980s, you knew about Chuckie Egg.
